resources.name: HZTZPrinter API
resources.description:
Complete collection for the HZTZPrinter Flask API server.

Start the server before running:
  python fool_printer.py serve

Default base URL: http://localhost:8360/api/

Endpoints:
  GET  /api/health
  GET  /api/templates
  POST /api/preview
  POST /api/print
  POST /api/attendance
  POST /api/qr
  GET  /api/usb
  GET  /api/test

resources.name: Core Endpoints
resources.description: Health check, available templates, USB device listing, and self-test suite.

resources.name: Preview
resources.description: Render tickets to text without connecting to the printer. Useful for debugging layouts and building web UIs.

resources.name: Print
resources.description: Send tickets to the ZJ-8360 thermal printer over USB. Requires the printer to be connected and powered on.

resources.name: Attendance
resources.description: Generate personalised student attendance tickets (April Fools edition). POST /api/attendance with a student email to get a funny receipt ticket with randomised items, QR rickroll, and custom overrides via the extend parameter.

resources.name: QR Code
resources.description: Generate QR codes as ASCII art (ascii/printer formats) or PNG images.

resources.name: Error Cases
resources.description: Negative tests — verify that the API returns proper error responses for invalid inputs.

resources.name: Health Check
resources.description:
Liveness probe. Returns 200 as long as the server process is running.
Does not require the printer to be connected.

Expected response:
  ok: true
  status: "ok"
  version: "1.0.0"
  printer.vendor_id: "0x416"
  printer.product_id: "0x5011"

resources.name: Templates
resources.description:
List available template names and every accepted option value.

Expected response:
  templates: ["event", "receipt"]
  paper_widths: [32, 40, 48]
  ec_levels: ["L", "M", "Q", "H"]
  qr_formats: ["ascii", "printer", "png"]
  qr_sizes: ["tiny", "small", "medium", "large"]

resources.name: USB Devices
resources.description:
Enumerate all connected USB devices and flag the ZJ-8360 printer.

Expected response:
  count: <number>
  printer_detected: <boolean>
  devices: [{vendor_id, product_id, manufacturer, is_printer}, ...]

resources.name: Self Tests
resources.description:
Run 13 built-in self-tests covering module imports, template creation, field resolution, rendering, QR generation, and sample JSON loading. No printer needed.

Expected response:
  passed: 13
  failed: 0
  total: 13
  results: [{name, status, detail}, ...]

resources.name: Preview Event Ticket
resources.description:
Render a single event ticket to text. Template is auto-detected from the data keys (event, seat, holder → event).

Expected: ok=true, template="event", count=1, previews[0] contains "Concert"

resources.name: Preview Receipt
resources.description:
Render a receipt to text. The engine auto-detects the receipt template because of the merchant/order/items/totals keys.

Expected: ok=true, template="receipt", previews[0] contains "Coffee Shop Express"

resources.name: Preview Multiple Tickets
resources.description:
Preview a batch of 3 event tickets in a single request. The data field is an array.

Expected: ok=true, template="event", count=3, previews has 3 entries

resources.name: Preview Event — Printer Safe
resources.description:
Same event ticket but with printer_safe=true. Unicode characters (€, —, curly quotes) are replaced with ASCII equivalents.

Expected: ok=true, printer_safe=true

resources.name: Print Event Ticket
resources.description:
Send a ticket to the ZJ-8360 thermal printer over USB.

⚠️ Requires the physical printer to be connected and powered on.
Returns 200 + printed=1 on success, or 503 if the printer is not found.

Options:
  no_cut: false — cut paper after printing
  feed_lines: 3 — blank lines before cutting

resources.name: Print Receipt
resources.description:
Print a receipt to the thermal printer.

⚠️ Requires the physical printer. Returns 503 if not connected.

resources.name: Attendance — Basic
resources.description:
Generate a personalised student attendance ticket with only the email.
Name, items, QR code, and funny elements are all auto-generated.

Expected: ok=true, template="attendance", student.name="Jean Dupont", preview contains EPITECH

resources.name: Attendance — With Extend
resources.description:
Test the extend parameter: deep-merge custom overrides on top of auto-generated ticket data.
Verifies dict fields are merged (address preserved) and lists/scalars are replaced.

Expected: merchant.name overridden, merchant.address preserved, items replaced, fun.motto overridden but fun.warning kept

resources.name: Attendance — Deterministic
resources.description:
Verify deterministic behaviour: same email always produces the same ticket number, 3-6 funny items, consistent totals.

Run this request twice — the ticket_number should be identical both times.

resources.name: Attendance — Custom Name & Seller
resources.description:
Test student_name and scanned_by overrides.
The student name should NOT be derived from the email, and scanned_by should appear as the seller.

Expected: student.name="Marie Curie (La Vraie)", staff.seller="Albert Einstein"

resources.name: QR ASCII
resources.description:
Generate a QR code as Unicode block art (█ characters).

Expected: ok=true, format="ascii", art is a multiline string, lines > 0

resources.name: QR Printer-Safe
resources.description:
Generate a QR code using # characters instead of Unicode blocks.
Uses highest error correction (H = 30%).

Expected: ok=true, format="printer", art contains '#', ec_level="H"

resources.name: QR PNG
resources.description:
Generate a QR code as a PNG image.

The response is raw binary (Content-Type: image/png), NOT the usual JSON envelope.
Insomnia will show the image in the preview pane.

Sizes: tiny (32×32), small (48×48), medium (96×96), large (144×144)

resources.name: Error — Missing Data Field
resources.description:
POST /api/preview without the required 'data' field.

Expected: 400, ok=false, error mentions "data"

resources.name: Error — Invalid Template
resources.description:
POST /api/preview with an unknown template name.

Expected: 400, ok=false, error mentions "nonexistent"

resources.name: Error — Invalid Paper Width
resources.description:
POST /api/preview with paper_width=99 (only 32, 40, 48 are valid).

Expected: 400, ok=false, error mentions "paper_width"

resources.name: Error — Invalid QR Format
resources.description:
POST /api/qr with format="bmp" (only ascii, printer, png are valid).

Expected: 400, ok=false, error mentions "format"

resources.name: Error — 404 Not Found
resources.description:
GET a route that does not exist.

Expected: 404, ok=false, error lists valid routes

resources.name: Error — No JSON Content-Type
resources.description:
POST /api/preview with a plain text body instead of JSON.

Expected: 400, ok=false, error mentions "application/json"

resources.name: Attendance — Error Missing Email
resources.description:
POST /api/attendance without the required student_email field.

Expected: 400, ok=false, error mentions "student_email"
